text: IMO: humans experiencing “free will” are the same thing as MIMD. This new medium is capable of MIMD, but we’re strangling it by applying SIMD thinking to it.

elements.text: IMO: humans experiencing “free will” are the same thing as MIMD. This new medium is capable of MIMD, but we’re strangling it by applying SIMD thinking to it.

text: Yes, it's both. But so far, "many humans" has had a much higher impact on our work habits than "many networked computers". The latter are used in ways that try to be mostly invisible, except to their administrators. That's what "agentic AI" wants to change.

elements.text: Yes, it's both. But so far, "many humans" has had a much higher impact on our work habits than "many networked computers". The latter are used in ways that try to be mostly invisible, except to their administrators. That's what "agentic AI" wants to change.

text: It's what has happened with technology for many centuries. The concentration of power in tech that allows starting a blitzkrieg is very recent.

elements.text: It's what has happened with technology for many centuries. The concentration of power in tech that allows starting a blitzkrieg is very recent.

text: How much of that is due to lack of regulatory oversight and concentration of power vs… it just being easier to deploy technologies? I mean, you can beam the technology straight into people’s pockets. Accessibility to new technologies is drastically greater.

it just being easier to deploy technologies? I mean, you can beam the technology straight into people’s pockets. Accessibility to new technologies is drastically greater.
